source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider the building block called 'Network N' shown in the figure. Let \( C = 100 \, \mu F \) and \( R = 10 \, k\Omega \). Two such blocks are connected in cascade as shown in the figure. The transfer function \(\frac{V_3(s)}{V_1(s)}\) of the cascaded network is ______.
